title: Digital Land Records Tamper-Proof System
objective: Build a blockchain-based platform to store, verify, and transfer land ownership records, eliminating fraudulent mutations and reducing litigation.

title: Enhancing Spectral Analysis of Water Bodies through Efficient Machine Learning Techniques.
objective: To develop an efficient spectral and machine learning–based framework for analyzing the impact of urbanization on water bodies by studying land-use changes, estimating water quality parameters (chlorophyll, turbidity, DOM), analyzing temporal variations using multispectral satellite data, improving atmospheric and cloud correction techniques, and designing an optimized loss function to enhance detection accuracy while minimizing false positives.

title: Government Tender Fraud Detection System
objective: Create a rule-based and ML system to detect bid-rigging and collusion in government e-procurement portals like GeM.

title: Unified Civil Service Exam Platform
objective: Design a secure, scalable online exam system for UPSC/MPSC with proctoring, live monitoring, and result analytics for millions of candidates.

title: Offline-First Digital Ration Management
objective: Build a ration card management system that works offline in rural areas, syncs on connectivity, and prevents ghost beneficiaries in PDS.

title: Smart Court Case Management System
objective: Develop a digital system for judiciary to track case progress, auto-schedule hearings, alert lawyers, and generate dashboards on pendency.

title: Pollution Source Tracking Web Platform
objective: Create a geo-tagged analytics platform aggregating industrial, vehicular, and construction pollution data from multiple sensors and reports.

title: Village-Level Digital Service Kiosk Software
objective: Design multilingual kiosk software (CSC) enabling villagers to apply for certificates, pensions, and schemes without middlemen.

title: Integrated Hospital Queue & Bed Management
objective: Build a real-time system for government hospitals to manage OPD queues, bed occupancy, doctor availability, and medicine stock across districts.

title: Scholarship Disbursement Tracking Portal
objective: Create an end-to-end portal to track scholarship applications, verification, disbursement, and utilization for SC/ST/OBC students with audit trails.

title: Smart Water Meter & Bill Management
objective: Develop an IoT-integrated IT platform for municipal water supply: read meters remotely, generate bills, detect leakages, and flag non-payment.

title: E-Lokshahi Document Authenticity Checker
objective: Build a QR/OTP-based document verification system for government-issued certificates to prevent forged marksheets, caste, and income certificates.

title: Rural Teacher Attendance & Quality Dashboard
objective: Develop a mobile and web platform where government school teachers mark geotagged attendance and principals monitor teaching quality with outcome data.

title: Integrated Panchayat Fund Audit Tool
objective: Create a transparent fund utilization tracker for Gram Panchayats under MGNREGS, 14th Finance Commission, and local grants with public dashboards.

title: Crop Disease Detection via Satellite Imagery
objective: Train ML models on Sentinel/Landsat satellite data to detect crop disease outbreaks at district level and alert agriculture departments early.

title: Intelligent Navigation System for Autonomous Drones using Adaptive Machine Learning
objective: Make real-time navigation decisions in dynamic environments. The system will be designed and tested in a simulation environment to enable adaptive path planning, obstacle avoidance, and environment-aware decision making, improving the efficiency, safety, and reliability of autonomous drone navigation.

title: Predictive Road Accident Hotspot Mapping
objective: Use historical accident data, weather feeds, and road geometry to train ML models predicting accident-prone stretches for preventive intervention.

title: ML-Based Welfare Scheme Eligibility Predictor
objective: Develop a model using Aadhaar-linked socio-economic data to proactively identify eligible citizens for PM Awas, Ujjwala, and similar schemes.

title: Smart CCTV Analytics for Traffic Violations
objective: Build edge AI on city CCTVs to auto-detect signal jumping, wrong-side driving, and helmetless riding; generate challans automatically.

title: AI-Powered Document Digitization for Archives
objective: Develop an OCR and NLP pipeline to digitize government archives (historical land records, birth/death registers) and make them fully searchable.

title: Fake News Detection in Regional Languages
objective: Build an NLP classifier detecting misinformation about government policies in regional languages across social media platforms.

title: District-Level Disease Surveillance Dashboard
objective: Design a real-time epidemiological dashboard aggregating health facility data to detect outbreak patterns and guide district health officers.

title: MGNREGS Worker Payment Analytics
objective: Create a data pipeline to detect payment delays, muster roll anomalies, and wage inconsistencies in MGNREGS worker data.

title: Urban Flood Prediction and Preparedness Tool
objective: Build a predictive analytics model using IMD rainfall data, city drainage maps, and historical flood records to issue early warning alerts.

title: Budget Expenditure Transparency Engine
objective: Develop a visual analytics engine for Union/State budget data showing department-wise expenditure trends, outcome mapping, and variance analysis.

title: Smart Beneficiary Deduplication System
objective: Use data science on Aadhaar, ration card, and pension databases to identify duplicate or ghost beneficiaries across welfare schemes.

title: Police Crime Pattern Analytics Platform
objective: Build a crime data analytics solution for state police to identify hotspots, seasonal patterns, and resource deployment optimization.

title: Municipal Solid Waste Route Optimization
objective: Apply data science on GPS data, waste generation rates, and vehicle capacity to optimize garbage collection routes for smart cities.

title: Smart Streetlight Grid Control System
objective: Design an electronics solution with dimming control, fault reporting, and energy metering for government smart streetlights across municipalities.

title: Tamper-Proof Electronic Voting Unit
objective: Develop an enhanced EVM prototype with biometric voter verification, paper trail, and real-time result upload under secure hardware design.

title: Soil Health Card Electronic Sensor Kit
objective: Build a portable, low-cost soil testing device for Krishi Vigyan Kendras to measure NPK, pH, and moisture on-site for farmers.

title: Smart Electricity Meter for Rural Feeders
objective: Design a smart meter node for rural electricity feeders with load monitoring, theft detection, and remote disconnect capability.

title: Wearable Distress Alert for Forest Guards
objective: Create a wearable device for forest department staff to send SOS with GPS location in no-network zones using LPWAN or satellite.

title: Manual Scavenger-Free Sewer Cleaning Machine
objective: Design a low-cost mechanical sewer cleaning robot for municipalities to eliminate hazardous manual entry in sewers per Supreme Court directives.

title: Low-Cost Prosthetic Limb for Accident Victims
objective: Develop a functional, affordable prosthetic limb for government ESIC hospitals using locally available materials and simple mechanical joints.

title: Portable Pothole Detection & Repair Unit
objective: Build a tow-behind mechanical unit for NHAI/PWD field teams that detects, marks, and pre-fills road potholes in a single pass.

title: Solar Pump Irrigation Automation System
objective: Design a mechanical-electronic system for PM-KUSUM solar pumps to automate ON/OFF based on soil moisture, reducing water wastage on farms.

title: Flood Relief Emergency Bridge Kit
objective: Design a rapidly deployable modular bridge system for NDRF teams that can be assembled without machinery in 30 minutes over a 10-metre span.

title: Municipal Waste Segregation Machine
objective: Build a mechanical system for ULBs to auto-segregate dry/wet municipal solid waste at source using vibration, density, and size differentiation.

title: Pipeline Inspection Robot for Water Supply
objective: Build an autonomous robot to inspect water supply pipelines for corrosion, cracks, and blockages, sending real-time video to Jal Jeevan Mission teams.

title: Mine Rescue Autonomous Robot
objective: Develop a remote-controlled robot for DGMS-approved mine rescue operations capable of carrying oxygen, sensing gas, and navigating debris.

title: Automated Border Fence Surveillance Bot
objective: Create a ground robot for BSF/CRPF border patrol that follows a predefined track, detects intrusions via thermal imaging, and sends live alerts.

title: Agricultural Drone for Pesticide Spraying
objective: Build a low-cost agricultural drone for state agriculture departments enabling precision pesticide application on small and fragmented farm plots.

title: Hospital Disinfection Robot for PHCs
objective: Develop a UV-C disinfection robot for government Primary Health Centres to autonomously disinfect wards between patient shifts.

title: Explosive Ordnance Disposal (EOD) Robot
objective: Design a remotely operated robot for police bomb squads to inspect, handle, and neutralize IEDs in public spaces without human exposure.

title: Rural Last-Mile Broadband via TV White Space
objective: Design a TVWS-based broadband connectivity solution for BharatNet to serve villages beyond fiber and licensed spectrum reach.

title: Disaster-Resilient Emergency Communication Network
objective: Build a mesh radio communication network for SDRF teams that functions without cellular infrastructure during flood/earthquake scenarios.

title: Smart Spectrum Monitoring for DoT
objective: Create an automated spectrum monitoring device for DoT field offices to detect unauthorized frequency transmissions in real time.

title: Remote Health Monitoring via Telemedicine Hub
objective: Develop a compact device for ASHA workers to collect and transmit patient vitals (BP, SPO2, ECG) from remote villages to district hospitals.

title: Smart Traffic Signal Control via V2I Communication
objective: Design a vehicle-to-infrastructure communication prototype for smart city signals to prioritize ambulances and government emergency vehicles.

title: Smart Structural Health Monitoring System
objective: Develop an IoT-based sensor network for government bridges and flyovers to monitor vibration, strain, and deflection in real time, alerting PWD engineers to structural anomalies before failure.

title: AI-Based Road Quality Assessment Tool
objective: Build a mobile application using computer vision and accelerometer data to automatically detect and classify road surface defects (potholes, cracks, rutting) for NHAI/PWD maintenance prioritization.

title: Construction Waste Recycling & Reuse Platform
objective: Design a digital tracking and marketplace platform for construction and demolition (C&D) waste under MOHUA’s C&D waste management rules, enabling contractors to quantify, segregate, and trade recyclable materials.

title: Groundwater Level Monitoring & Recharge Dashboard
objective: Develop an IoT-linked platform integrating data from CGWB piezometers, rainfall gauges, and recharge structures to track aquifer levels district-wise and recommend artificial recharge interventions under Jal Shakti Abhiyan.

title: Digital Twin for Urban Infrastructure Planning
objective: Create a GIS-integrated digital twin model for smart city authorities to simulate the impact of new construction projects on existing drainage, traffic, and utility networks before physical approvals are granted.
